overall.description: First-person exploration of a Hogwarts-style castle interior, featuring grand wooden halls, sweeping staircases, stone corridors, and furnished dormitories. The player character moves continuously through connected rooms with detailed historic architecture and warm lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand entrance hall with main staircase

agents.ego_description: walking through the grand hall, observing the notice board and architectural details

entered.detail: sweeping wooden staircase with ornate railings leading to upper floors
large cork board with papers and colorful triangular pennant banners
elaborate hanging light fixture with multiple candles
tall arched windows letting in bright natural light
dark wood paneled walls with decorative moldings

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a grand castle entrance hall featuring a magnificent wooden staircase. The camera moves through the space, passing a notice board on the left and approaching the central staircase, with warm natural light streaming through large arched windows above.

events.description: begins ascending the grand wooden staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing the curved wooden staircase, following the railing upward

entered.detail: arched stone doorway at the top of the stairs
framed painting of a landscape scene on the wall

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the grand wooden staircase, transitioning from the open hall to a more enclosed stairwell. Stone archways become visible at the landing above, while the lower hall elements recede from view.

events.description: transitions from wooden paneling to stone walls and corridors
lighting becomes dimmer as entering enclosed stone stairwell

agents.ego_description: moving through stone corridors and descending a narrower wooden staircase with stone walls

entered.detail: passageway with grey stone block walls and large windows
tall dark wood bookcase filled with books
lit wall-mounted lantern providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts to stone architecture as the camera moves through a corridor with bookshelves, then descends a narrower wooden staircase enclosed by stone walls. Wall sconces provide warm artificial lighting in the dimmer stairwell.

scene_state.functional_zone: long corridor with portraits and hanging lanterns

events.description: entering dimly lit corridor with hanging lanterns and portrait paintings

agents.ego_description: walking down a long interior hallway lined with portraits and wooden paneling

entered.detail: long ornate red rug with decorative patterns running down the hallway
framed portraits of figures in historical dress lining both walls
series of suspended lantern lights illuminating the corridor

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a transitional hallway with a red carpet, then enters a long corridor illuminated by hanging lanterns. Portrait paintings in gilded frames line the wood-paneled walls, creating a historic atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular dormitory bedroom with four-poster beds

events.description: entering a large furnished bedroom through a heavy wooden door

agents.ego_description: entering the dormitory and looking around at the beds, furniture, and architectural details

entered.detail: large wooden bed with canopy and red curtains
exposed dark wooden beams and rafters supporting the roof
tall dark wood cabinet with carved details
circular ornate rug with intricate patterns on the wooden floor
black cast iron stove with pipe extending to ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a spacious circular dormitory with a high beamed ceiling and large windows. The room contains four-poster beds, wooden wardrobes, a central stove heater, and stacks of books, creating a cozy medieval student living space.

events.description: entering a second dormitory room similar to the first

agents.ego_description: moving through the second bedroom, examining the furniture and layout

entered.detail: additional wooden canopy bed with red drapery
writing desk with stacks of books and papers
dress form with clothing items
large decorative wall hanging with colorful imagery

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a second circular dormitory with similar architecture to the first, featuring exposed wooden beams, multiple four-poster beds, a writing desk with stacks of books, and a dress mannequin. The room is lit by bright natural light from large gothic windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a grand, light-filled castle entrance through a series of historic corridors and into cozy student dormitories. It begins in a magnificent hall where warm natural light streams through arched windows, moving past a notice board and ascending a grand wooden staircase. As the camera reaches the landing, the open space transitions into a sequence of stone archways and bookshelves before descending a narrower, dimly lit stairwell illuminated by wall sconces. The scene then shifts through a red-carpeted hallway and a long, wood-paneled corridor lined with gilded portraits and hanging lanterns. Finally, the camera enters a series of spacious circular dormitories featuring high beamed ceilings, four-poster beds, and gothic windows that flood the medieval living spaces with bright light.
